constants.materialisation_note: full REAL materialisation pass, 2 shared cores, 2026-07-12 (this build; PROPOSED-ASM-1429 one-off cost row)
constants.no_direction_presumed: the ledger may show the engine cheaper at any realistic N (PROPOSED-ASM-1429); this manifest presumes nothing
constants.train_flops_formula: 6 * N_active_base * tokens_seen (disclosed formula; descriptive ledger field, identical across arms)

engine_at_inference_descriptive.note: PROPOSED-ASM-1429/1848: NO direction presumed and NO break-even N* computed — the in-campaign engine-at-inference comparator (B4) was struck as vacuous, so any engine-vs-train-slot price comparison is cross-campaign and disclosed as such; B5 (R3 no-fine-tune) is the in-campaign efficiency comparator.
engine_at_inference_descriptive.source: the landed rules-1-c campaign efficiency ledger (poc/rules-1/results-incoming/20260712-142704-rules1b-parallel; campaign graded INSTRUMENT-INVALID — its price rows are wall-clock/compute measurements and remain citable as prices, never as hypothesis evidence)
engine_at_inference_descriptive.status: DESCRIPTIVE, CROSS-CAMPAIGN (B4 struck — issue #24 decision (C) + blocking-pilot IP-4, PROPOSED-ASM-1848)

efficiency_ledger.usd_attribution_note: eval USD per arm/rung = measured cell wall hours x the assumed GPU list rate; per-query USD on the main surface uses flops-share attribution (disclosed formula).

holm.construction: review fix 3 + GO revision: one-sided bootstrap p-values (BCa inversion; percentile for the s1' ratio with conservative +inf replicates), two-stage FT-seed (cluster) x item resampling, B=10000, PRNG seed 20260712; Holm step-down at family alpha 0.05 over {s1p, s2p, s4p} (s3' STRUCK with the B4 arm — issue #24 decision (C) + blocking-pilot IP-4, PROPOSED-ASM-1848); s4' is an intersection-union test (p = max of the two component ps).

inference_compute.detail: per-arm/rung breakdown in /analysis/efficiency_ledger (review fix 4; B4 struck — issue #24 (C))

engine_at_inference_descriptive.note: PROPOSED-ASM-1429/1848: NO direction presumed and NO break-even N* computed — the in-campaign engine-at-inference comparator (B4) was struck as vacuous, so any engine-vs-train-slot price comparison is cross-campaign and disclosed as such; B5 (R3 no-fine-tune) is the in-campaign efficiency comparator.
engine_at_inference_descriptive.source: the landed rules-1-c campaign efficiency ledger (poc/rules-1/results-incoming/20260712-142704-rules1b-parallel; campaign graded INSTRUMENT-INVALID — its price rows are wall-clock/compute measurements and remain citable as prices, never as hypothesis evidence)
engine_at_inference_descriptive.status: DESCRIPTIVE, CROSS-CAMPAIGN (B4 struck — issue #24 decision (C) + blocking-pilot IP-4, PROPOSED-ASM-1848)

memory.instrument_note: review fix 4: measured per cell — CUDA allocator peak (reset per cell) on GPU; process peak RSS (monotone high-water mark, named per entry) on CPU/mock

primary_band.rule: review fix 3 / registered SESOI: PASS iff LB95 > 0.05; KILL-d iff LB95 <= 0; 0 < LB95 <= 0.05 is INCONCLUSIVE (neither pass nor kill)

rung_sign_descriptive.note: two rungs license a SIGN, not a slope (ASM-1433); the frozen envelope presumes NO direction, so the record's scale_language_max is 'none'

B0.note: reported separately, NEVER pooled (ASM-1436); only s_out carries the internalisation claim (ASM-1423)
